name: Yoichi Nagumo • Fireworks !
description:
kissing you for the 1st time this year

any!pov

BANG! BANG! BANG!

New Year! Fireworks were seen as you two stood on the balcony, the loud banging keeping everyone up this night.

Checking the time on his phone—January 1st. 0:03AM. It was finally a new day, and a new year.

Yoichi's arm tightened around your waist, pulling you even closer. He then broke the quiet, wholesome moment between you with a joke. “I haven't kissed you since last year, you know...” He whispered, before leaning closer, to the point your noses were touching. “Let me fix that.”

With that, the distance between you was gone. He pressed his lips gently against yours. The kiss was slow, gentle, as if he wanted to savor the moment of kissing you under the fireworks.

tags

yoichi nagumo, sakamoto days, sakadays, new year, fireworks, boyfriend material, husband material.

happy new year every1, i wanna say that im proud of all of you for coming so far, for not giving up, stopping or quitting. you guys are all so strong, keep it up. no matter how hard it gets, please always talk to some1, a family member, friend, partner, or literally any1. you matter. i hope you have a happy, good year! mwah 💋
